mapper.select:
SELECT pbr.id, pbr.user_id, pbr.product_id, pbr.product_name, pbr.product_type, pbr.browse_time, pbr.browse_duration, pbr.ip_address, pbr.created_at,
ui.NAME AS userName, ui.images AS userImages,
wmp.product_name, wmp.product_type, wmp.risk_level FROM product_browse_record pbr LEFT JOIN user_info ui ON (ui.id = pbr.user_id) LEFT JOIN wealth_management_product wmp ON (wmp.id = pbr.product_id) WHERE 1 = 1
AND ui.name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{queryFrom.userName},'%')
AND wmp.product_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{queryFrom.productName},'%')
AND ui.user_id = #{queryFrom.userId}
ORDER BY pbr.created_at DESC
